redirects._comment: Apex to www, and the root MUST be its own rule. Verified against production: neither /:path* nor /(.*) matches a path ending in a slash, so with only a wildcard the homepage answered 200 and the visitor stayed on the apex, while every asset on that page 308'd across to www. Cross-origin, so img-src 'self' refused all of it and every image broke for anyone who typed the domain without the www. Probe it with a fresh path: /x must 308 and /x/ must not 404.
Same rule for /journal/ and any other directory root.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; frame-src 'none'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.clarity.ms; font-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://static.cloudflareinsights.com https://www.clarity.ms https://*.clarity.ms; connect-src 'self' https://cloudflareinsights.com https://static.cloudflareinsights.com https://*.clarity.ms https://c.bing.com; manifest-src 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
